name: Package Delivery Coordinator
description: Coordinate several expected deliveries using a user-provided watchlist, conflict check, follow-up plan, and message templates for neighbors or front desk staff.
use_cases: Build a watchlist from user-provided delivery details.
Map arrival windows and spot conflicts with the user's schedule.
Draft polite notices for neighbors, front desk, building staff, or household members.
Set follow-up checkpoints so packages are not forgotten or misplaced.
